sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n106424" key="u(drome/trion" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὑδρο-μέτριον</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <sense id="n106424.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">vessel for measuring a flow of water,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Ptol.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Alm.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">5.14</biblScope> </bibl> (cj. for <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">-ιῶν</foreign>), <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg4036.tlg002:4:71" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Procl.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Hyp.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4.71</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
